summary: Live validationUpdate variable-input evidence that functionId/functionHandle rebind keys are rejected by GraphQL variable coercion before resolver execution.

errors.message: Variable $validation of type ValidationUpdateInput! was provided invalid value for functionId (Field is not defined on ValidationUpdateInput)

notes.lifecycle: The request uses an arbitrary missing validation id because Shopify rejects the unknown ValidationUpdateInput fields during variable coercion before resolving id or executing validationUpdate.
